title: feat: issue automation pipeline with Polly triage
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Polly joins the triage team
gist.blurb: We've hooked up our very own Polly to auto-triage GitHub issues. She's now spotting duplicates, closing resolved tickets, and even triggering auto-fixes before a human even blinks.
gist.summary: Added an automated GitHub Actions pipeline that uses the Polly API to intelligently triage new issues, detect duplicates, and trigger auto-fixes.
gist.impact: Contributors will see faster issue responses and cleaner project boards as routine ticket management is now handled automatically.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a project manager. She should be wearing a tiny detective hat or holding a clipboard, sorting through a stack of GitHub issue tickets (represented as pixelated paper documents). The Nomnom creature can be helping by eating the 'duplicate' tickets.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny detective hat and holding a clipboard, sorting through a stack of pixelated paper tickets. Nearby, the round Nomnom creature happily eats a ticket stamped 'DUPLICATE'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
